mapper.delete: DELETE FROM employee_modifications WHERE CONVERT(DATE, sync_date) = CONVERT(DATE, #{syncDate})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO employee_modifications(staff_id, last_update, sync_date, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.staffId}, #{item.lastUpdate}, #{item.syncDate}, GETDATE())
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT staff_id FROM employee_modifications WHERE CONVERT(DATE, sync_date) IN
CONVERT(DATE, #{syncDate})
